span.p:
WebXR client — R8, R12, R33
Join keypad · toolbar · HUD · spatial audio (R28)
d3-spatial renderer · three.js + WebXR
Per-mark cells: line · arc · stream · IMU · video
Health monitor · DEMO mode · fake-data fallback

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Identity & access control
Join code issuance — R20 (ttl · max_uses · scope)
PKI / OIDC — R23 · shared secret — R24
Short-lived scoped JWT per session

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Hyperlocal Context Engine — R19, R21
Manifest store (UDM + USM + marks)
Device proxy & discovery — mDNS · LAN · HTTPS tunnel
Telemetry bus — HTTP today, MQTT planned
Policy engine — R17 · Audit log — R16 · Export — R18

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IoT devices & services — R10, R13, R24
Sensors: vitals · env · camera · IMU
Actuators: lighting · audio · thermostat
People avatars — R26 (future)
